video:video.video:title: EASEN Smart Factory Showcase — Commercial Furniture Manufacturing
video:video.video:description: Inside EASEN's smart factory: 10,000m² facility producing custom commercial furniture for hotels, restaurants and cafes worldwide.

video:video.video:title: EASEN Factory Tour — Inside Our Furniture Production
video:video.video:description: A walkthrough of EASEN's commercial furniture factory in Foshan, China, showing materials, craftsmanship and quality control.
